message:
fix(text-effects): improve reveal mask alpha calculation for edge colors

The RevealMask soft edge alpha calculation now uses the maximum channel
value instead of just the red channel. This fixes incorrect alpha
computation when the base color has a zero red component (e.g., pure
green or blue).

The algorithm now:
1. Finds the max channel value of the original color
2. Finds the max channel value of the masked color
3. Computes alpha multiplier as the ratio of masked/original max values

This ensures correct gradient fading regardless of the base color's
channel distribution.

Also applied rustfmt to test assertions for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
